blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Verify inclusion of photo/video release in the waiver form
Check if the waiver form includes a section for photo/video release.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of including a photo/video release within the same form as the liability waiver. However, the evidence does not confirm that the photo/video release is indeed part of the form, as it only mentions the inclusion of a photo/video release without providing concrete evidence of its presence in the actual implementation. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the photo/video release is included within the same form as the liability waiver.
